what_it_does: Defines a single ATTACHMENT_TYPE dict declaring a 'dragnet_runs' attachment type: a tracked dragnet RUN bound to a channel, target_kind='address' (a run-record address run://corpus/.../dragnet/<id>), multi=True; the desc enumerates the run telemetry captured (started/ended/duration, files_total/processed/failed/retries, throughput, coverage) as the introspective record, accumulating a queryable run history per channel.
observations: target_kind is 'address' pointing to a run-record address scheme run://corpus/.../dragnet/<id>.
Most verbose desc of the six: lists concrete telemetry fields captured per run.
Frames the run telemetry as 'the introspective record of the process'.
States the channel accumulates a queryable dragnet-run history.
Two-line docstring also describes the run as an operational record over an input directory.
standouts: Spells out a telemetry schema (times, resources, fails, retries, coverage) for a dragnet run.
Positions the channel as the accumulator of queryable run history.
conventions: Same single-dict descriptor pattern as siblings, but with a much richer desc and a multi-line docstring.
Inline comment documents the address scheme for target_kind.
notes: Registry entry for 'dragnet_runs': a run-record-address attachment whose desc doubles as the telemetry/introspection spec for a channel's dragnet run history.
questions: What is a dragnet RUN concretely, and where is the run telemetry persisted and made queryable?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — declares the dragnet-run attachment type and its introspective record semantics per the docstring.
intention_signals: Aims to make every dragnet run over a channel's input a tracked, addressed, introspectable record so channels build a queryable operational history.
novelty: Embedding a concrete run-telemetry field list directly in the attachment-type descriptor.
contribution: Contributes the declarative definition of the dragnet-run attachment type plus its enumerated telemetry/introspection fields and run-address scheme.
summary_for_embedding: A descriptor module declaring the 'dragnet_runs' channel attachment type: an addressed run-record (run://.../dragnet/<id>) capturing run telemetry, multi=True, accumulating queryable history.
intention_for_embedding: To register dragnet runs as tracked, addressed, introspectable channel attachments that build a queryable operational history.
